name: 2-Drawer Rectangular Office Desk -Oak Brown - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring style and functionality to your home office with this 2-Drawer Rectangular Office Desk from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of wood, this office desk features two drawers that glide smoothly to store your office essentials. Designed in a brown hue, this rectangular office desk sits on four legs, each supported by chair glides for surface protection. Add this desk to your space for a minimalist look and space-saving organization.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
